narrative_beat: Wide crepúsculo P&B com datacenter e vitral gótico com letra C estilizada

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide twilight establishing shot with a futuristic datacenter silhouette in desaturated black-and-white on the horizon
subject.focal_point: a gothic cathedral stained-glass window in the foreground bearing the stylized letter C in gold and crimson as an alchemical sigil
subject.secondary: Dense embers and ash drift across the scene; the cathedral frame glows warm.

environment.location: a surreal bridge between cathedral and datacenter

composition.foreground: stained-glass C sigil in rich gold and crimson
composition.midground: cathedral window frame with faint smoke
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white datacenter silhouette on horizon

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: letter C as sigil of new power

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
